🏁
FUEL-UP
PIT STOP!
It's race day — and your car needs fuel!
Choose healthy GO foods to fill the tank and get back on track. Watch out for SLOW foods that drain your score and stall the race.
How fast can you complete your pit stop?
SELECT DIFFICULTY
🏁 HOW TO PLAY
🎯

Your Mission

It's race day — time for a PIT STOP! Tap GO foods rolling past on the conveyor belt to fill your fuel tank and get the racecar back on the track. Choose your difficulty before the race to set the challenge!

🟢

GO Foods +fuel & +points

GO foods are packed with healthy nutrients that fuel our bodies AND our minds. Tap them to add fuel and earn +50 points!

🥕 Carrots 💧 Water 🥛 Milk 🍗 Grilled Chicken 🍚 Brown Rice & Quinoa 🍌 Banana 🍠 Sweet Potato & Black Beans
🔴

SLOW Foods NO fuel & −points

SLOW foods don't have enough healthy nutrients to fuel us — and can make our bodies feel sluggish. Tapping them gives zero fuel and costs you 30 points!

🍩 Donut 🥤 Soda 🍟 Chips 🍔 Cheeseburger 🍕 Pizza 🍪 Cookie 🍦 Ice Cream
⏱️

PIT STOP Speed Challenge

Each difficulty level has a different pit stop speed challenge: 60s, 45s, or 30s. Finish your pit stop within your level's challenge time and you earn a +100 point bonus at the end of the game! Speed AND accuracy both matter — think like a real pit crew!

⚙️

Difficulty Levels

Each difficulty changes the rules — choose your challenge before the race!

🟢 Easy🟡 Medium🔴 Hard
GO foods to win203030
Speed Challenge60s45s30s
Belt penalty3 SLOWs in a row2 in a rowEvery SLOW
Time boost−2s each GO−10s per 10 streak−5s per 10 streak
Food labels✅ Visible✅ Visible❌ Hidden
🏆

Hall of Fame

After each race, enter your name and pit crew into the Hall of Fame. Each difficulty has its own leaderboard, ranked by fastest time. Can you top all three?

💡

Tips from the Pit Crew

  • Earn a FUEL BOOST by building a GO foods streak! Keep tapping only GO foods without choosing any SLOW foods, and you can earn a time bonus to help you make a fast pit stop!
  • Tap too many SLOW foods in a row, and the conveyor belt slows to a crawl.
  • On Hard mode, the food labels and color-coded frames are hidden — you'll have to identify which foods are GO foods or SLOW foods on your own!
READY... SET... GO (NOT SLOW)!!!
